Pipeline: UNKNOWN (generation method not recorded)
Model: v3.2.1

Parameters:

  time_horizon: 2025-2050
  baseline_year: 2025
  random_seed: 42

Quality Gate Results:
  schema_compliance: WARN (missing required provenance fields)
  cross_reference_integrity: PASS (2/2 catalog entries valid)
  structural_invariants: PASS (all constraints satisfied)

Anomalies:
  1. No generation timestamp in config
  2. Source bundle not declared
  3. Generation method not declared
  4. No manifest.json in bundle

Warnings:
  1. Bundle provenance is incomplete
  2. Cannot verify generation pipeline without metadata

Overall: WARN (provenance gap)
